name: Reflex Cat Lick Treat Variety Pack
description: An assortment of REFLEX Cat Lick Treats (2) - satisfying liquid snacks. No artificial colours or preservatives and gluten-free. Variety pack includes one each of these flavours: Lick Snack - two flavours in one pack: 3 x Poultry, Liver & Biotin, 3 x Salmon; and Milk Cream.
